title: Newton's Method for Root Finding
description: Iterative numerical method for finding roots of functions
mermaid: graph TD A1[Define Function f(x) and Derivative f'(x)] --> B1["Choose Initial Guess x0"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#ffffff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#ffffff B1 --> C1[Set iteration counter i = 0] style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 C1 --> D1[Calculate f(xi) and f'(xi) ] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff D1 --> E1[Compute xi+1 = xi - f(xi)/f'(xi) ] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff E1 --> F1[Calculate |xi+1 - xi|] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff F1 --> G1{|xi+1 - xi| < Tolerance?} style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 G1 -- Yes --> H1[Root ≈ xi+1 ] style H1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff G1 -- No --> I1{i < Max Iterations?} style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 I1 -- Yes --> J1[Increment i = i + 1 ] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff J1 --> D1 I1 -- No --> K1[Method Failed to Converge ] style K1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff H1 --> L1[End] K1 --> L1 style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000
entities: Define Function f(x) and Derivative f'(x)
